pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh script and explicit task instructions.
Confirmed from task description asking for 'https://securedrop.org' and 'https://www.propublica.org'.
Confirmed via export_result.sh mapping and explicit task instructions.
Confirmed via export_result.sh which evaluates the Tor Browser pref 'browser.security_level.security_slider' == 4 as 'safest'.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly require changing the Tor Browser Security Level to 'Safest', corresponding to a security_slider preference value of 4 (as implemented in Tor Browser and verified in the export script). The agent must configure NoScript to trust the exact domains securedrop.org and propublica.org, and then export this configuration. The exported policy must be renamed and moved precisely to the expected output path '/home/ga/Documents/noscript_policy.txt', which the task verification script explicitly checks.
